metaData.Key Information:
• 2.32m² (7.62m x 30.4cm)
• Great for refrigerator storage
• Keeps food fresh in the refrigerator and prevents food from drying out
• Keeps odours and flavours from transferring
• Covers all shapes and sizes of glass, wood and plastic bowls or platters
metaData.Preparation:
• Wrap leftovers in foil for refrigerate
• To reheat, place foil covered baking dish in oven
metaData.SAP Product Name: DIAMOND ALUMINUM FOIL - 8.33YDS X 12IN (25 SQ FT) 1S

metaData.Key Information:
• Made from Polyethylene, an inert non-toxic material containing no placticisers or PVC
• Easy to handle with controllable roll
• Creates a tight seal with versatile wrap to keep food fresh
• Product dimension: 18.6m² (60m x 30.5 cm)
• Meet U.S. FDA standards for food packaging (Temperature tolerance: 110°C)
metaData.Preparation:
• Directions
1. Before opening, push in side tabs to secure roll
2. Lift tab from the right hand side and peel off the strip to opex box
3. Simply lift and pull roll
4. Pull amount of wrap needed
5. Tear wrap down and across the cutter
6. Stretch wrap over food for longer lasting freshness
• Microwave
1. Allow at least 2cm of space between cling wrap and food
2. To allow steam to escapr, turn back one corner of cling wrap
3. Always use caution when removing cling wrap from heated foods
• Caution
1. Do not use clingwrap when using a browing dish
2. Do not pierce holes in clingwrap
3. Do not allow clingwrap to contact hot sugary and fatty foods as this may cause melting

metaData.Key Information: Made from a high-quality baking and cooking paper with a specially designed non-stick coating, which eliminates the need for fats and oils when cooking enabling you and your family to eat healthier with less mess. It can also withstand temperatures of up to 230°C which makes it suitable for use in in ovens, fry pans, microwaves, sandwich presses, freezers and BBQ hotplates.
Diamond Aluminum Foil 75 SQFT is impressed with the best premium look embossed foil. It is great for cooking, freezing, wrapping and storing.

offers.description: Buy 1 Diamond Aluminum Foil (75 square feet) @ $6.85

metaData.Key Information:
• For dry or damp food
• Thermal insulation
• Rigid
• Hygienic

** Products with assorted designs and colours will be picked and given on a random basis
• Both sides of foil can be used
• Prevent cakes and roast from burning
• Wrap leftover foods in foil which can be quickly reheated in oven
metaData.Preparation:
1. Cover with foil if food is cooking too quickly before continue cooking
2. Once meat is cooked, cover with foil to keep warm and retain moisture
• Important:
Not recommended to cover stainless steel dishes with foil
metaData.Storage Information:
• Keep it in dry place
• Keep away from children

metaData.Key Information:
• Dimensions: 75m x 30cm
• Reduces moisture loss of food to retain freshness and flavour
• Prevents the transfer of odours
• Ideal for wrapping anything from sandwiches to freezer items
• Ideal for reheating leftovers and warming meals
metaData.Preparation:
1. When reheating, firmly stretch food wrap over container and leave a small opening to allow steam to escape
2. Use a large container that allows an inch or more between the food and the plastic wrap

metaData.Key Information:
• Food grade quality
• Leak proof
• Hygienic

Glad Non-Stick Aluminum Foil has a special coating which prevents food from sticking without added fat or oil. Even sticky or delicate food like baked-on cheese or roast chicken skin lifts off with ease. Ideal for cooking, baking, barbecuing and lining grillers.

Ensure you place the dull non-stick side next to food and then use as you would
